prompt: Identify the official municipal archive holding the Rowan Mill deed, then fetch a primary accession record to verify the year the deed was donated. Do not use genealogy forums or snippet text. If the first record is blocked, find another official archival copy.

search_1.query: Rowan Mill deed official municipal archive

fetch_2.title: Collection 14 Accession Register
fetch_2.content: Accession 14-77 records the Rowan Mill deed as a 1974 donation from the Bell family estate.
